name: Sour Cream Mushroom Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and salt.
2. Add milk to oil and stir into the flour mixture.
3. Roll on a damp surface between two pieces of waxed paper. Remove the top piece of wax paper and lift the bottom piece with the pastry rolled onto it, flipping it into the pie pan. Remove the paper. Pinch the sides up high.
4. Quiche:
a. Wash, dry, and slice mushrooms.
b. Saute onions in butter; add mushrooms. Cook until mushrooms are brown but still firm.
c. Beat eggs in a medium-sized bowl. Add sour cream, salt, and Worcestershire sauce. Mix ingredients until blended.
d. Add grated cheese. Drain mushrooms and onions, then add to the egg mixture.
e. Pour into the pastry shell.
5. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) until the custard has set and the quiche is browned on top.
This recipe may be served as a main dish or as hors d'oeuvres. For hors d'oeuvres, use tart pans if desired.
